title: Rust Seed/PrivateKey/Identity derive Copy
description: In keys.rs, Seed and PrivateKey derive Copy, allowing implicit secret copying. Same for Identity struct. This violates key lifecycle hygiene. Remove Copy derive and consider secrecy::Secret wrapper.
close_reason: Already fixed - Seed/PrivateKey use ZeroizeOnDrop which prevents Copy (see comments in keys.rs lines 20-21, 74-75)
